lead_qualification: Never call capture_lead until you have BOTH a name AND a contact method (phone or email). If you only have the visitor's problem description, ask for their name and contact first before calling capture_lead.

Before calling capture_lead, always ask: Is this an emergency (active leak, storm damage) or are you looking for an inspection or future quote? If emergency or ready to book, call capture_lead immediately and mark URGENT. If just a general question, answer it first, then ask if they would like someone to follow up — only call capture_lead if they say yes.

faq.a: Yes, all inspections and estimates are completely free with no obligation.

faq.q: Do you work with insurance companies?
faq.a: Yes, we handle the entire insurance claim process for you — inspection, documentation, and direct communication with your adjuster.

faq.q: How long does a roof replacement take?
faq.a: Most full replacements are completed in 1 to 3 days depending on roof size and complexity.

faq.q: What roofing materials do you use?
faq.a: We work with asphalt shingles, metal roofing, and flat/TPO roofing. We'll recommend the best fit for your home and budget.
Yes, we offer a 10-year workmanship warranty on all installations plus manufacturer material warranties.
Yes, fully licensed and insured. We carry general liability and workers comp so you're protected throughout the job.
We serve the greater Houston area including surrounding counties. Call us to confirm your location.

faq.q: How do I know if I need a repair or full replacement?
faq.a: If your roof is under 15 years old with isolated damage, a repair is usually enough. Older roofs or widespread damage typically need replacement. Our free inspection will tell you exactly what you need.
